_comment: MERGE this into your Claude Code ~/.claude/settings.json under the existing 'hooks' object — do NOT overwrite hooks you already have. Replace <python> with your launcher (Windows: py ; macOS/Linux: python3) and /path/to/lamp_status.py with the real path. Set the lamp IP via the WLED_IP env var or inside lamp_status.py. Field meanings: 'matcher' filters which sub-event fires the hook (for Notification: permission_prompt vs idle_prompt; for PreToolUse: tool name, "" = all tools); 'async': true runs the command without blocking the turn; 'timeout' caps it in seconds. IMPORTANT: Stop is intentionally NOT wired — it fires when a turn ends even if Claude just launched a background subagent/workflow and is still busy, which would flash a false green. Green comes from idle_prompt + SessionStart instead.
